name: Infinite Acts (Loop)
author: Community
description: After act 3, loops Overgrowth → Hive → Glory forever (regenerated maps; ch.4–6 = tier 1, 7–9 = tier 2). Ch.1–3 vanilla. From ch.4: +25% HP / +10% enemy dmg per tier (defaults, configurable), merchant +5%/run floor (tier 1+), random pools & solo-stack on by default. Loop Glory: Architect Ancient by default (optional variety). Composable roster off in code (enable in JSON). Map Tier label + pause stats panel. Harmony; MP scaling past act 2.
